/** * Landing Page Component * Public landing page for the application */ import React from "react"; import { User, MessageSquare, Pill, Video, Calendar, ArrowRight, Activity, FileText, Shield, TrendingUp, } from "lucide-react"; import Navbar from "../components/common/Navbar"; import Footer from "../components/common/Footer"; const LandingPage = ({ onLoginClick }) => { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Your Health, Simplified

Connect with doctors instantly, track medications, and manage your health all in one place.

Upcoming Appointment

Dr. Sarah Williams

Cardiologist

Today, 2:00 PM
{/* How it Works */}

How It Works

Get quality healthcare in three simple steps

{[ { icon: User, title: "Create Account", description: "Sign up in seconds and complete your health profile", }, { icon: MessageSquare, title: "Connect with Doctors", description: "Chat or video call with certified healthcare professionals", }, { icon: Pill, title: "Manage Health", description: "Track medications, symptoms, and receive personalized care", }, ].map((step, idx) => (
{idx + 1}

{step.title}

{step.description}

))}
{/* Features Grid */}

Everything You Need

Comprehensive healthcare tools designed for modern living

{[ { icon: Video, title: "Video Consultations", description: "Face-to-face appointments from anywhere", color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-600", }, { icon: Pill, title: "Medication Tracking", description: "Never miss a dose with smart reminders", color: "bg-teal-100 text-teal-600", }, { icon: Activity, title: "Symptom Checker", description: "AI-powered health assessment tool", color: "bg-rose-100 text-rose-600", }, { icon: FileText, title: "Digital Prescriptions", description: "Secure electronic prescriptions", color: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-600", }, { icon: Shield, title: "HIPAA Compliant", description: "Your data is encrypted and secure", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-600", }, { icon: TrendingUp, title: "Health Analytics", description: "Track your progress over time", color: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-600", }, ].map((feature, idx) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* Stats Section */}

); }; export default LandingPage;
